calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #4, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch (Trustee). Stanley Perryman (Objector).

Mr. Perryman stated that he agrees with the original request for fees and nothing additional. The Court indicated that the 1% guideline rule is for annual fees and that the additional hours are required. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Sr. Deputy M. Benton.
